title.en: IEEE 802.15.8 PAC: Overview, Definitions, Conventions, and the Big Picture
title.zh: IEEE 802.15.8 PAC：总览、术语定义、格式约定与整体框架

blocks.en: IEEE Std 802.15.8-2017 defines **Peer Aware Communications (PAC)** — a wireless personal area network (WPAN) standard built for devices to talk *directly* to each other, with no access point, base station, or other infrastructure in the middle. The standard calls each participant a **PD (PAC device)**: any entity that implements 802.15.8. A PAC network is simply two or more PDs sharing the same physical channel, coordinating themselves in a *fully distributed* way (Clause 1.1, General). This first lesson walks through the standard's front matter — the Overview, the Definitions/acronyms/word-usage clause, the format conventions for reading frame layouts, and the General description that paints the whole architecture before the detailed MAC and PHY clauses arrive.
blocks.zh: IEEE Std 802.15.8-2017 定义了 **对等感知通信（PAC，Peer Aware Communications）**——这是一种无线个域网（WPAN，Wireless Personal Area Network）标准，专为设备之间*直接*通信而设计，中间不需要接入点、基站或任何基础设施。标准把每个参与者称为 **PD（PAC 设备，PAC device）**：任何实现了 802.15.8 的实体。一个 PAC 网络就是两个或更多共享同一物理信道、并以*完全分布式*方式自我协调的 PD（条款 1.1，总则）。本节课通览标准的开篇部分——总览、术语/缩写/用词约定条款、阅读帧布局所需的格式约定，以及在详细的 MAC 与 PHY 条款出现之前先描绘整体架构的总体说明。

blocks.en: **Scope and Purpose (Clauses 1.2, 1.3).** The *scope* (1.2) says 802.15.8 specifies both the PHY (physical layer) and MAC (medium access control) layer for peer-to-peer, infrastructure-less operation with fully distributed coordination. Its headline features: discovering peer information *without* first associating, discovery signaling typically above 100 kb/s, neighborhood discovery, scalable data rates (the scope text cites up to 10 Mb/s; the General description later cites up to 320 Mb/s), group communication with simultaneous membership in multiple groups, relative positioning, operation in globally available unlicensed/licensed bands below 11 GHz, and security. The *purpose* (1.3) frames why this matters: scalable, low-power, highly reliable links for emerging services — social networking, advertising, gaming, streaming, and emergency services — with multiple PHYs to cover different bands and requirements.
blocks.zh: **范围与目的（条款 1.2、1.3）。** *范围*（1.2）指出 802.15.8 同时规定了 PHY（物理层，physical layer）和 MAC（媒体访问控制层，medium access control）层，面向无需基础设施、采用完全分布式协调的点对点运行。其核心特性包括：在*无需*先关联的情况下发现对等方信息、发现信令速率通常高于 100 kb/s、邻域内 PD 的发现、可伸缩的数据速率（范围文字给出最高 10 Mb/s，而后文总体说明给出最高 320 Mb/s）、可同时加入多个群组的群通信、相对定位、工作在 11 GHz 以下全球可用的非授权/授权频段，以及安全机制。*目的*（1.3）阐明其意义：为社交网络、广告、游戏、流媒体和应急服务等新兴业务提供可伸缩、低功耗、高可靠的链路，并定义多种 PHY 以覆盖不同频段与需求。

blocks.en: The defining trait to remember: PAC is **infrastructure-less and fully distributed**. There is no central coordinator — every PD is equal in operation. Discovery happens *before* any link is set up, so devices can learn who and what is nearby (and which services they offer) without joining anything first.
blocks.zh: 需要记住的标志性特征：PAC 是 **无基础设施且完全分布式** 的。没有中心协调者——每个 PD 在运行上都是对等的。发现发生在建立任何链路*之前*，因此设备无需先加入任何网络，就能了解附近有谁、有什么（以及它们提供哪些服务）。

blocks.en: **Definitions and word usage (Clauses 3.1, 3.3).** Clause 3.1 pins down the vocabulary the rest of the standard leans on. A **superframe** is a periodic time interval made of a synchronization period, a discovery period, a peering period, and a communication period — the heartbeat of PAC. A **cyclic-superframe** groups multiple superframes with scheduled active and inactive periods (a duty cycle for power saving). **Discovery** is detecting other PDs and their services; **peering** is establishing the actual links *after* discovery; **de-peering** tears those links down. A **complex channel** combines an RF (radio frequency) center frequency with a code sequence. A **resource element (RE)** is a unit of OFDM resources — 90 kHz bandwidth, 0.5 ms duration. Clause 3.3 (word usage) is the rulebook for reading requirements: **shall** = mandatory, **should** = recommendation, **may** = permitted, **can** = possibility/capability.
blocks.zh: **定义与用词（条款 3.1、3.3）。** 条款 3.1 固定了标准其余部分所依赖的术语。**超帧（superframe）** 是一个周期性时间区间，由同步周期、发现周期、配对周期和通信周期组成——它是 PAC 的“心跳”。**循环超帧（cyclic-superframe）** 把多个超帧按计划的活跃/非活跃周期组合起来（一种用于省电的占空比）。**发现（discovery）** 是检测其他 PD 及其服务；**配对（peering）** 是在发现*之后*建立实际链路；**解除配对（de-peering）** 则拆除这些链路。**复合信道（complex channel）** 把一个 RF（射频，radio frequency）中心频率与一个码序列结合起来。**资源单元（RE，resource element）** 是 OFDM 资源的一个单位——带宽 90 kHz，时长 0.5 ms。条款 3.3（用词）是阅读各项要求的规则手册：**shall** = 强制要求，**should** = 建议，**may** = 允许，**can** = 可能性/能力。

blocks.en: **Acronyms (Clause 3.2).** The standard front-loads a long acronym table — these recur constantly, so it helps to anchor a few up front. **CAP** = contention access period, **CFP** = contention free period (the two halves of the communication period). **CSMA/CA** = carrier sense multiple access with collision avoidance, one of the channel-access schemes. **MLDE/MLME** = MAC layer data entity / MAC layer management entity; **PLDE/PLME** = the PHY equivalents. **SAP** = service access point (the interface between layers). **OFDM/OFDMA** = orthogonal frequency division multiplexing / multiple access. **UWB** = ultra-wide band (one of the supported PHYs, and the one that adds precision ranging). **CQI** = channel quality indicator. **PPDU** = PHY protocol data unit; **PSDU** = PHY service data unit; **MHR** = MAC header. You'll meet most of these again in the deepdive's coverage map.
blocks.zh: **缩写（条款 3.2）。** 标准在开篇就给出一张很长的缩写表——这些缩写会反复出现，所以先记住几个关键的会很有帮助。**CAP** = 竞争访问周期（contention access period），**CFP** = 无竞争周期（contention free period）（二者构成通信周期的两个部分）。**CSMA/CA** = 带冲突避免的载波侦听多址（carrier sense multiple access with collision avoidance），是信道访问方案之一。**MLDE/MLME** = MAC 层数据实体 / MAC 层管理实体；**PLDE/PLME** 是其 PHY 对应实体。**SAP** = 服务接入点（service access point，层间接口）。**OFDM/OFDMA** = 正交频分复用 / 正交频分多址。**UWB** = 超宽带（ultra-wide band，受支持的 PHY 之一，也是新增精确测距能力的那一个）。**CQI** = 信道质量指示（channel quality indicator）。**PPDU** = PHY 协议数据单元；**PSDU** = PHY 服务数据单元；**MHR** = MAC 头。其中大多数会在下面的深入解析覆盖图里再次见到。

blocks.en: **Format conventions (Clause 4).** Before showing any frame, the standard explains *how to read* the frame pictures. Clause 4.1 (General) says data structures crossing the SAP interfaces are drawn in a **serial bit convention** — and within a PHY frame, a MAC frame must be smaller than the PHY's maximum PSDU size. Clause 4.2 (Fields) details the drawing rules: each field is a column labelled in **octets or bits**; a field can itself contain a nested data structure (4.2.1 Overview, Figure 1). **Numbers** (4.2.2) come in decimal `nnn`, binary `0bnnn`, or hex `0xmm`; "Integers" are 8-bit unsigned, "Signed integers" are 32-bit two's-complement, "Float" is single-precision. **Strings** (4.2.3) are content mapped onto another format (e.g. ASCII or keys) rather than read as a number. **Transmission order** (4.2.4) is leftmost-octet first, and within an octet LSB (least significant bit) first. **Reserved fields** (4.2.5) are set to zero on send, ignored on receive. **Data rate units** (4.2.6) standardize symbols like kb/s, Mb/s, Ksps, Msps.
blocks.zh: **格式约定（条款 4）。** 在展示任何帧之前，标准先解释*如何阅读*这些帧图。条款 4.1（总则）规定：跨越 SAP 接口的数据结构以**串行比特约定（serial bit convention）** 绘制——并且在一个 PHY 帧内，MAC 帧必须小于该 PHY 的最大 PSDU 尺寸。条款 4.2（字段）给出绘图规则：每个字段是一列，以**八位组（octet）或比特（bit）** 标注；一个字段本身可以包含嵌套的数据结构（4.2.1 概述，图 1）。**数字（4.2.2）** 有十进制 `nnn`、二进制 `0bnnn` 或十六进制 `0xmm` 三种表示；“Integers”为 8 位无符号，“Signed integers”为 32 位补码，“Float”为单精度。**字符串（4.2.3）** 是映射到其他格式（如 ASCII 或密钥）而非按数字解读的内容。**传输顺序（4.2.4）** 为最左八位组优先，且在一个八位组内以 LSB（最低有效位，least significant bit）优先。**保留字段（4.2.5）** 在发送时置零、接收时忽略。**数据速率单位（4.2.6）** 统一了 kb/s、Mb/s、Ksps、Msps 等符号。

blocks.svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 460 120" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><text x="0" y="14" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="11">Octets:  2          1          Variable</text><rect x="0" y="24" width="120" height="34"/><rect x="120" y="24" width="90" height="34"/><rect x="210" y="24" width="160" height="34"/><text x="60" y="45" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="10" text-anchor="middle">Field A</text><text x="165" y="45" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="10" text-anchor="middle">Length</text><text x="290" y="45" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="10" text-anchor="middle">Field C (size = Length)</text><text x="0" y="82" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="11">Bits within an octet:</text><rect x="0" y="90" width="180" height="24"/><rect x="180" y="90" width="60" height="24"/><text x="90" y="106" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="9" text-anchor="middle">Field B  (bits 0-5)</text><text x="210" y="106" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="9" text-anchor="middle">Resvd 6-7</text><text x="250" y="82" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="10">LSB -> MSB; leftmost octet first</text></svg>

caption.en: How 802.15.8 draws a data structure (Clause 4.2): columns sized in octets or bits, a Length field preceding a Variable field, reserved bits set to zero, transmitted leftmost-octet-first and LSB-first.
caption.zh: 802.15.8 如何绘制数据结构（条款 4.2）：各列以八位组或比特标注尺寸，Length 字段位于 Variable 字段之前，保留比特置零，传输时最左八位组优先、LSB 优先。

blocks.en: **The big picture (Clause 5).** Clause 5.1 (General) restates the goals — scalability, low power, high reliability, fully distributed coordination, fast peer discovery, scalable group communication — and lists capabilities: unicast/multicast/broadcast, distributed coordination *and* synchronization, discovery before peering, multi-group membership, relative positioning, CSMA/CA or ALOHA access, CQI, and scalable data rates up to 320 Mb/s, across multiple PHYs (Clauses 11-13). Clause 5.2 (Components) is delightfully simple: a conforming system is two or more PDs, PDs on the same physical channel form a PAC network, and **all PDs are equal**. Clause 5.3 (Topologies) allows mesh or star arrangements built from one-to-one, one-to-many, and many-to-many relationships — and a PD can run several concurrent sessions with different peers at once.
blocks.zh: **整体框架（条款 5）。** 条款 5.1（总则）重申了目标——可伸缩、低功耗、高可靠、完全分布式协调、快速对等发现、可伸缩的群通信——并列出能力：单播/多播/广播、分布式协调*与*分布式同步、配对前发现、多群组成员身份、相对定位、CSMA/CA 或 ALOHA 访问、CQI，以及跨多种 PHY（条款 11-13）最高 320 Mb/s 的可伸缩数据速率。条款 5.2（组成）非常简洁：一个符合标准的系统由两个或更多 PD 构成，处于同一物理信道上的 PD 构成一个 PAC 网络，且 **所有 PD 一律对等**。条款 5.3（拓扑）允许由一对一、一对多和多对多关系构建的网状或星形拓扑——并且一个 PD 可以同时与不同对等方运行多个并发会话。

blocks.en:
flowchart LR
  subgraph PD["PAC Device (PD)"]
    APP["Higher layers\n(network / app)"]
    MAC["MAC layer\nMLDE + MLME"]
    PHY["PHY\nPLDE + PLME"]
    APP -->|MLDE/MLME-SAP| MAC
    MAC -->|PLDE/PLME-SAP| PHY
  end
  PHY -->|over the air| AIR((Physical channel))
blocks.zh:
flowchart LR
  subgraph PD["PAC 设备 (PD)"]
    APP["高层\n(网络 / 应用)"]
    MAC["MAC 层\nMLDE + MLME"]
    PHY["PHY\nPLDE + PLME"]
    APP -->|MLDE/MLME-SAP| MAC
    MAC -->|PLDE/PLME-SAP| PHY
  end
  PHY -->|空口| AIR((物理信道))

blocks.en: **Layered architecture (Clauses 5.4.1-5.4.3).** Clause 5.4.1 (Overview) introduces the layering: every PD must support at least one PHY plus a MAC, and layers talk through SAPs. Higher layers (network, application) sit above but are *outside* this standard's scope. Clause 5.4.2 (PHY) gives the PHY two services — **PLDE** (data: sends/receives PPDUs over the radio channel) and **PLME** (management) — with features like transceiver activation, energy detection (ED), CQI, channel switching, clear channel assessment (CCA), and packet transfer; the UWB PHY adds precision ranging. Clause 5.4.3 (MAC) mirrors this with **MLDE** (data: moves MAC frames across the PHY) and **MLME** (management); its features include channel scan, distributed synchronization, RE management, acknowledged delivery, discovery, peering, de-peering, relative-positioning support, and security.
blocks.zh: **分层架构（条款 5.4.1-5.4.3）。** 条款 5.4.1（概述）引入分层：每个 PD 必须支持至少一个 PHY 加一个 MAC，各层通过 SAP 通信。高层（网络、应用）位于其上，但*不在*本标准范围之内。条款 5.4.2（PHY）赋予 PHY 两项服务——**PLDE**（数据：在无线信道上收发 PPDU）和 **PLME**（管理）——其特性包括收发机激活、能量检测（ED）、CQI、信道切换、空闲信道评估（CCA）和分组传输；UWB PHY 还增加了精确测距。条款 5.4.3（MAC）与之对应，提供 **MLDE**（数据：在 PHY 上传输 MAC 帧）和 **MLME**（管理）；其特性包括信道扫描、分布式同步、RE 管理、确认式投递、发现、配对、解除配对、相对定位支持以及安全。

blocks.en: **How a PAC network actually runs (Clauses 5.5.1-5.5.6).** Everything beats to the **superframe** (5.5.1): synchronization period -> discovery period -> peering period -> communication period (split into CAP and CFP), repeating back-to-back. The **cyclic-superframe** (5.5.2) bundles superframes into active/inactive cycles so a group can pick a duty cycle, save power (a PD may shut its receiver during inactive periods), and reduce interference — mandatory for the OFDM PHY, optional for UWB. **Communication types** (5.5.3): unicast (one-to-one), multicast (one-to-many or many-to-many to a group), broadcast (one-to-many to everyone reachable). **Synchronization** (5.5.4) acquires the superframe's reference timing — initial sync at startup, then maintenance, then re-sync if timing is lost. **Discovery** (5.5.5) finds nearby PDs in three flavors: one-way (transmit/scan discovery info in a time-frequency matrix of 21-octet discovery resource elements), untargeted two-way (broadcast a Discovery Request, collect Responses), and targeted two-way (multicast the request). **Peering** (5.5.6) then establishes links among discovered PDs — one-to-one, one-to-many, or many-to-many.
blocks.zh: **PAC 网络实际如何运行（条款 5.5.1-5.5.6）。** 一切都随 **超帧**（5.5.1）的节拍跳动：同步周期 -> 发现周期 -> 配对周期 -> 通信周期（再分为 CAP 和 CFP），背靠背地不断重复。**循环超帧**（5.5.2）把若干超帧打包成活跃/非活跃循环，使群组可以选择占空比、省电（PD 可在非活跃期关闭接收机）并降低干扰——对 OFDM PHY 为强制，对 UWB 为可选。**通信类型**（5.5.3）：单播（一对一）、多播（面向群组的一对多或多对多）、广播（面向可达范围内所有 PD 的一对多）。**同步**（5.5.4）获取超帧的参考时序——启动时进行初始同步，随后维护同步，若时序丢失则重新同步。**发现**（5.5.5）以三种方式找到附近的 PD：单向（在由 21 字节发现资源单元构成的时频矩阵中发送/扫描发现信息）、非定向双向（广播发现请求并收集响应）、定向双向（多播该请求）。**配对**（5.5.6）随后在已发现的 PD 之间建立链路——一对一、一对多或多对多。

summary.en: Coverage map — every clause taught in this lesson, by exact number
summary.zh: 覆盖图——本课所讲每个条款的精确编号

blocks.en: Clause 1 Overview: 1.1 General (PAC = infrastructure-less, fully distributed WPAN among PDs); 1.2 Scope (PHY+MAC, discovery without association, >100 kb/s discovery signaling, scalable rates, multi-group, relative positioning, sub-11 GHz bands, security); 1.3 Purpose (scalable/low-power/reliable links for social, advertising, gaming, streaming, emergency; multiple PHYs). Clause 3: 3.1 Definitions (superframe, cyclic-superframe, discovery, peering, de-peering, complex channel, resource element, PD, etc.); 3.2 Acronyms (CAP, CFP, CSMA/CA, MLDE/MLME, PLDE/PLME, SAP, OFDM/OFDMA, UWB, CQI, PPDU/PSDU, MHR, ...); 3.3 Word usage (shall/should/may/can). Clause 4 Format conventions: 4.1 General (serial bit convention; MAC frame < max PSDU); 4.2.1 Overview (field columns in octets/bits, recursive structures, Figure 1); 4.2.2 Numbers (decimal/binary/hex; Integers=8-bit unsigned, Signed=32-bit two's-complement, Float); 4.2.3 Strings (mapped, not numeric); 4.2.4 Transmission order (leftmost octet first, LSB first); 4.2.5 Reserved fields (zero on tx, ignored on rx); 4.2.6 Data rate units (kb/s, Mb/s, Ksps, Msps). Clause 5 General description: 5.1 General (goals + capability list, up to 320 Mb/s, PHYs in Clauses 11-13); 5.2 Components (two or more PDs on one channel; all equal); 5.3 Network topologies (mesh/star; one-to-one/one-to-many/many-to-many; concurrent sessions, Figure 3); 5.4.1 Architecture overview (layers, SAPs, at least one PHY + MAC, Figure 4); 5.4.2 PHY (PLDE/PLME, ED/CQI/CCA/channel switching, UWB ranging); 5.4.3 MAC (MLDE/MLME, scan/sync/RE mgmt/ack/discovery/peering/de-peering/positioning/security); 5.5.1 Superframe structure (sync/discovery/peering/communication=CAP+CFP); 5.5.2 Cyclic-superframe (active/inactive duty cycle, power save; mandatory OFDM, optional UWB); 5.5.3 Communication types (unicast/multicast/broadcast); 5.5.4 Synchronization (initial/maintain/re-sync); 5.5.5 Discovery (one-way, untargeted two-way, targeted two-way; 21-octet discovery REs); 5.5.6 Peering (one-to-one/one-to-many/many-to-many, per 6.10).
blocks.zh: 条款 1 总览：1.1 总则（PAC = PD 之间无基础设施、完全分布式的 WPAN）；1.2 范围（PHY+MAC、无需关联即可发现、>100 kb/s 发现信令、可伸缩速率、多群组、相对定位、11 GHz 以下频段、安全）；1.3 目的（为社交、广告、游戏、流媒体、应急提供可伸缩/低功耗/可靠链路；多种 PHY）。条款 3：3.1 定义（超帧、循环超帧、发现、配对、解除配对、复合信道、资源单元、PD 等）；3.2 缩写（CAP、CFP、CSMA/CA、MLDE/MLME、PLDE/PLME、SAP、OFDM/OFDMA、UWB、CQI、PPDU/PSDU、MHR……）；3.3 用词（shall/should/may/can）。条款 4 格式约定：4.1 总则（串行比特约定；MAC 帧 < 最大 PSDU）；4.2.1 概述（以八位组/比特标注的字段列、递归结构、图 1）；4.2.2 数字（十/二/十六进制；Integers=8 位无符号，Signed=32 位补码，Float）；4.2.3 字符串（映射而非数字）；4.2.4 传输顺序（最左八位组优先、LSB 优先）；4.2.5 保留字段（发送置零、接收忽略）；4.2.6 数据速率单位（kb/s、Mb/s、Ksps、Msps）。条款 5 总体说明：5.1 总则（目标与能力清单，最高 320 Mb/s，PHY 见条款 11-13）；5.2 组成（同一信道上两个或更多 PD；一律对等）；5.3 网络拓扑（网状/星形；一对一/一对多/多对多；并发会话，图 3）；5.4.1 架构概述（分层、SAP、至少一个 PHY+MAC，图 4）；5.4.2 PHY（PLDE/PLME，ED/CQI/CCA/信道切换，UWB 测距）；5.4.3 MAC（MLDE/MLME，扫描/同步/RE 管理/确认/发现/配对/解除配对/定位/安全）；5.5.1 超帧结构（同步/发现/配对/通信=CAP+CFP）；5.5.2 循环超帧（活跃/非活跃占空比、省电；OFDM 强制、UWB 可选）；5.5.3 通信类型（单播/多播/广播）；5.5.4 同步（初始/维护/重新同步）；5.5.5 发现（单向、非定向双向、定向双向；21 字节发现 RE）；5.5.6 配对（一对一/一对多/多对多，见 6.10）。

cites.note: Clause 3: 3.1 Definitions, 3.2 Acronyms and abbreviations, 3.3 Word usage
Clause 5 General description: 5.1-5.3, 5.4.1-5.4.3 Architecture, 5.5.1-5.5.6 Functional overview
